attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.EXPEDITE_ID, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.LINE_ID, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.LINE_NUMBER, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.ORDER_NUMBER, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.SHIP_SET_NUMBER, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.RESPONSE_DATE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.PLANNER_CODE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.COMMIT_DATE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.REJECT_CODE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.REQUEST_STATUS, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.QUANTITY, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.SCHEDULE_DATE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.PROMISE_DATE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.REQUEST_DATE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.ITEM, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.REJECT_REASON, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.FCD_DATE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.SHIPPED_FLAG, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.COMMIT_REASON, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.AUTO_COMMIT_DATE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.REQUEST_TYPE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.EXP_REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.EXP_PRIORITY, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.LATEST_ACCEPTABLE_DATE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS,
 (
 select EXPEDITE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS
 minus
 select EXPEDITE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DETAILS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.EXPEDITE_ID = STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.EXPEDITE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DTLS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_CMF_EXPEDITE_LINE_DETAILS)
